heading: Registration requirements
label: 87f–1 Registration requirements

children.text: any person who only incidentally or occasionally buys for sale, or handles, weighs, or transports grain for sale and is not engaged in the regular business of buying grain for sale, or handling, weighing, or transporting grain for sale;
any producer of grain who only incidentally or occasionally sells or transports grain which the producer has purchased;
any person who transports grain for hire and does not own a financial interest in such grain; or
any person who buys grain for feeding or processing and not for the purpose of reselling and only incidentally or occasionally sells such grain as grain.

children.label: A
children.text: the name and principal address of the business,

children.label: B
children.text: the names of all directors of such business,

children.label: C
children.text: the names of the principal officers of such business,

children.label: D
children.text: the names of all persons in a control relationship with respect to such business,

children.label: E
children.text: a list of locations where the business conducts substantial operations, and

children.label: F
children.text: such other information as the Secretary deems necessary to carry out the purposes of this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: such person has an ownership interest of 10 per centum or more in such business, or

children.label: B
children.text: a business or group of business entities, with respect to which such person is in a control relationship, has an ownership interest of 10 per centum or more in such business.

For purposes of clauses (A) and (B) of paragraph (2) of this subsection, a person shall be considered to own the ownership interest which is owned by his or her spouse, minor children, and relatives living in the same household.

children.heading: Certificate of registration
children.label: c Certificate of registration
children.text: The Secretary shall issue a certificate of registration to persons who comply with the provisions of this section. The certificate of registration issued in accordance with this section shall be renewed annually. If there has been any change in the information required under subsection (b), the person holding such certificate shall, within thirty days of the discovery of such change, notify the Secretary of such change. No person shall engage in the business of buying grain for sale in foreign commerce, and in the business of handling, weighing, or transporting of grain in foreign commerce unless the person has registered with the Secretary as required by this chapter and has an unsuspended and unrevoked certificate of registration.

children.heading: Suspension or registration of certificate of registration
children.label: d Suspension or registration of certificate of registration
children.text: The Secretary may suspend or revoke any certificate of registration issued under this section whenever, after the person holding such certificate has been afforded an opportunity for a hearing in accordance with sections 554, 556, and 557 of title 5, the Secretary shall determine that such person has violated any provision of this chapter or of the regulations promulgated thereunder, or has been convicted of any violation involving the handling, weighing, or inspection of grain under title 18.

children.heading: Fees
children.label: e Fees
children.text: The Secretary shall charge and collect fees from any person registered under this section. The amount of such fees shall be determined on the basis of the costs of the Secretary in administering the registration required by this section. Such fees shall be deposited in, and used as part of, the fund described in .section 79(j) of this title
